Battery Not Charging severity:High causes:Port damage faulty cable battery failure
Cracked Screen severity:High causes:Physical impact drop damage
Rapid Battery Drain severity:Medium causes:Background apps degraded battery software bug
Phone Overheating severity:High causes:Overloaded CPU faulty battery blocked vents
Laptop Overheating severity:High causes:Clogged fan dried thermal paste dust buildup
Keyboard Keys Not Working severity:Medium causes:Spill damage mechanical failure driver issue
No Display Output severity:Critical causes:GPU failure display cable backlight failure
Blue Screen of Death BSOD severity:Critical causes:Driver conflict RAM failure storage failure
Dead Pixels Screen Lines severity:High causes:Panel damage T-Con board failure
Disc Drive Not Reading severity:Medium causes:Laser lens dirty motor failure worn drive

iPhone Battery Replacement difficulty:Moderate time:45-60 minutes steps:Remove Bottom Screws Apply Heat and Open Display Disconnect Battery Connector Remove Display Assembly Remove Old Battery Install New Battery Reconnect Display and Close Reinstall Pentalobe Screws and Test

Samsung Galaxy Screen Replacement difficulty:Expert time:60-90 minutes steps:Heat and Remove Back Glass Disconnect Battery Disconnect All Flex Cables Heat and Remove Front Display Clean Frame Install New Screen Assembly Reconnect Everything and Test Apply Back Glass

MacBook Thermal Paste Replacement difficulty:Moderate time:30-45 minutes steps:Remove Bottom Case Disconnect Battery Remove Heat Sink Clean Old Thermal Paste Apply New Thermal Paste Reinstall Heat Sink and Close

PS5 Liquid Metal Application difficulty:Expert time:45-60 minutes steps:Remove PS5 Shell Remove Fan and Heat Sink Clean Old Liquid Metal Mask Surrounding Area Apply Liquid Metal Reinstall Heat Sink Reassemble and Test
Laptop RAM Upgrade difficulty:Easy time:15-30 minutes steps:Power Off and Unplug Remove Bottom Panel Disconnect Battery Connector Remove Old RAM Sticks Install New RAM Sticks Reassemble and Test

Desktop GPU Replacement difficulty:Easy time:20-30 minutes steps:Power Down and Unplug PC Open Case Side Panel Uninstall Old GPU Drivers Remove Old GPU Seat New GPU in PCIe Slot Connect Power Cables and Test

TV Backlight Strip Replacement difficulty:Moderate time:1-2 hours steps:Unplug and Remove TV Stand Remove Back Panel Screws Separate Front Bezel Remove Diffuser Layers Replace Failed LED Strips Reassemble and Test

Phone Charging Port Cleaning difficulty:Easy time:10-15 minutes steps:Power Off the Device Inspect Port with Flashlight Remove Lint with Wooden Toothpick Use Compressed Air to Clear Debris Test Charging

Router Firmware Update difficulty:Easy time:15-20 minutes steps:Log into Router Admin Panel Navigate to Firmware Section Download Latest Firmware from Vendor Upload and Apply Firmware Verify Router Reboots and Reconnects

PS5 Disc Drive Laser Replacement difficulty:Expert time:45-60 minutes steps:Remove Shell and Disc Drive Disassemble Drive Housing Remove Old Laser Assembly Install New Laser Unit Reassemble Drive Reinstall and Test Disc Reading
